title: gladiolus emiliae
intro: Gladiolus emiliae, also known as the sword lily or Gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's corms have been used in herbal medicine, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and saponins. Gladiolus emiliae can be prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, often used as a remedy in traditional African and Asian medicine.
